name: list_files
description: Project file metadata: name, path, mime, kind, size, mtime, optional artifactManifest. Pass since=<unix-ms> to cheap-poll for changes.

project.description: Project id (UUID) or name substring. Optional; defaults to the active project (expires after ~5 minutes of no Open Design activity).

since.description: Unix-ms; only return files with mtime > since.
